siteMetadata.name: Caleb Cross
siteMetadata.title: Caleb Cross | Full-Stack Developer
siteMetadata.about:
Self-driven and motivated Full Stack Software Engineer with 3 years of experience implementing pixel perfect UI/UX design systems
and crafting full stack web experiences using React with Next.js and Node.js with Prisma. Recently launched a E-commerce site built
using Next.js and Shopify and led an initiative to bring a website up to WCAG2 standard.
